label: Scenario
description: The scenario configuration embedded in a ScenarioDef. Contains the player faction, surface layer, and the list of all scenario parts that define starting conditions and game rules.

name.label: Name
name.description: Display name of this scenario shown in the scenario selection menu. Translated.

summary.label: Summary
summary.description: Short one-line description of this scenario shown in the scenario selection menu. Translated.

description.label: Description
description.description: Full multi-line description of this scenario shown in the scenario selection detail view. Translated.

playerFaction.label: Player faction
playerFaction.description: Fixed scenario part defining the player faction type for this scenario.

surfaceLayer.label: Surface layer
surfaceLayer.description: Fixed scenario part defining the starting planet layer for this scenario.

parts.label: Parts
parts.description: All additional scenario parts that modify starting conditions, apply game rules, and configure player pawns. Each list item selects a concrete scenario part type via the Class attribute.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this scenario is active and available for selection.

showInUI.label: Show in UI
showInUI.description: Whether this scenario is shown in the scenario selection menu.

valid.label: Valid
valid.description: Whether this scenario has passed validation and can be used to start a game.

standardAnomalyPlaystyleOnly.label: Standard anomaly playstyle only
standardAnomalyPlaystyleOnly.description: When true, this scenario is only available when using the standard Anomaly DLC playstyle.
